changeSet.author: cherevko
changeSet.sql:
UPDATE g SET g.nodes_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dbo.Nodes n WHERE n.graph_id = g.graph_id) FROM dbo.graph g;
INSERT INTO dbo.tables (db_, name, type, author, version, service, description, column_count, created_at) VALUES ('liquibase_lab', 'graph table', 'ALTER_TABLE', 'cherevko', 2, 'graph_service', 'Added nodes_count field for denormalization.', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('graph table')), SYSUTCDATETIME());
